"use strict"; Object.defineProperty(exports, Symbol.toStringTag, { value: "Module" }); const useRouterState = require("./useRouterState.cjs"); function useCanGoBack() { return useRouterState.useRouterState({ select: (s) => s.location.state.__TSR_index !== 0 }); } exports.useCanGoBack = useCanGoBack; //# sourceMappingURL=useCanGoBack.cjs.map
